# Windsurf Editor Changelog - Complete Content Extract

## Latest Versions & Major Updates

**Version 1.9577.43** (March 19, 2026): Fixed Mac x64 build issues.

**Version 1.9577.42** (March 19, 2026): "Various bug fixes and performance improvements"

**GPT-5.4 Mini** (March 17, 2026): New model available at 1x credits promotional pricing.

**Version 1.9577.27** (March 12, 2026): Apple M5 compatibility fix.

**Version 1.9577.24** (March 9, 2026): Major Cascade improvements including Jupyter Notebook support, diff zone fixes, and SKILL.md file loading from `.windsurf/skills/` directory. MCP system-level skill definitions for Enterprise via MDM configs added.

**GPT-5.4** (March 5, 2026): Multi-tier reasoning model with promotional pricing (1x-8x credits based on reasoning level).

## Featured Model Releases

- **Claude Sonnet 4.6** (Feb 17): 2x credits (no thinking), 3x credits (with thinking)
- **Gemini 3.1 Pro** (Feb 19): 0.5x-1x credits based on thinking level
- **GLM-5 & Minimax M2.5** (Feb 17): 0.75x and 0.25x credits respectively
- **Claude Opus 4.6** (Feb 4): 2x-3x credits; fast mode variant at 10x-12x credits
- **SWE-1.5 Free** (Dec 27, 2024): Full intelligence model available free for 3 months
- **Falcon Alpha** (Oct 22, 2025): Stealth speed-focused agentic model
- **Grok Code Fast 1** (Aug 15, 2025): Available free for limited time
- **GPT-5** Suite (Aug 7, 2025): Low, medium, high reasoning variants free for limited period
- **Kimi K2** (July 23, 2025): 0.5 credits per prompt

## Major Features & Capabilities

**Cascade Agent Improvements:**
- Planning Mode with automatic code mode switching
- Multi-agent parallel sessions with Git worktree support
- Dedicated terminal (zsh) for improved reliability
- Context window usage indicator
- Auto-linting of proposed changes
- Cascade Hooks for custom execution at workflow points
- Support for Agent Skills and system-level rules/workflows
- Queued message handling for sequential processing

**Arena Mode** (Wave 14): Side-by-side model comparison with hidden identities, battle groups, personal/global leaderboards, and voting system.

**MCP (Model Context Protocol):**
- OAuth authentication support
- Resource loading and multimodel responses
- Prompt support
- GitLab and GitHub remote integration
- Streamable HTTP transport
- System-level definitions for Enterprise

**Windsurf Tab (Autocomplete Evolution):**
- Unified experience combining autocomplete, supercomplete, Tab to Jump, Tab to Import
- Predictive triggers and increased context awareness
- Near-instant feedback with 3x faster performance claims
- Tab to Import for automatic dependency suggestions

**Codemaps** (Beta):
- Codebase visualization and navigation
- Chat with map functionality
- Mermaid diagram generation
- AI-powered suggestions and analysis

**Windsurf Previews** (Beta): Local website preview in IDE with element selection, console error sharing, and React component inspection.

**Web & Documentation Search:**
- Automatic web search triggering
- URL input and page reading
- @web and @docs mention commands
- Popular documentation site indexing

**Planning & Workflows:**
- Plan Mode for pre-implementation task planning
- Custom saved workflows with slash commands
- File-based rules with glob pattern attachment
- "Megaplan" advanced form for comprehensive planning

**Additional Features:**
- Voice input for Cascade interaction
- Image upload and multimodal analysis (up to 1MB+)
- Cascade conversation sharing (Teams feature)
- DeepWiki hover documentation
- Vibe and Replace for AI-powered find-and-replace
- Fast Context subagent (SWE-grep) for 20x faster relevant code discovery
- Jupyter Notebook tool support
- Deploys to Netlify functionality
- Commit message generation
- Terminal command auto-execution with allow/deny lists
- Memory system for context retention
- Dev Container support (including Windows beta)
- WSL and SSH remote support
- Conversation history table of contents

## Enterprise & Teams Features

- MDM-managed configuration for system-level skills
- Windsurf Reviews GitHub app (500 reviews/month for Teams)
- Team Knowledge integration with Google Docs
- Analytics dashboard with Cascade metrics
- Conversation sharing between team members
- Admin control over available models
- Organization-wide command execution allow/deny lists
- Cascade Hooks cloud configuration
- Devin service key authentication

## Performance & Stability Improvements

- Over 100 bug fixes in recent releases
- Sticky scroll lag resolution
- Terminal rendering optimization
- Vim extension typing lag fixes
- Memory leak corrections
- SSH & Remote performance enhancements
- RTL language rendering improvements
- Autocomplete error handling improvements
- Windows update initialization path fixes

## Deprecations & Removals

- **Windsurf Browser** (deprecated Sept 11): Refactoring planned; users directed to Previews feature
- **Legacy Mode**: Removed in favor of Write and Chat modes
- **Knowledge Base Feature**: Removed
- **Autocomplete Setting**: Removed as legacy option

## Platform & Infrastructure Updates

- VS Code base upgrades (1.108, 1.99.1, 1.97.0, 1.98, 1.99.3)
- Linux ARM64 native client support with deb/rpm packaging
- Windows ARM beta support
- RHEL 8 support fixes
- Electron & Chromium updates
- Code OSS 1.105.0 (Electron 37.6.0, Chromium 138.0.7204.251)

## Pricing & Credit System Changes

- April 21, 2025: Shift from Flow Action Credits to Prompt Credits model
- Prompt credits consumed per message (not per tool call)
- Auto-top-off feature with maximum limits
- Promotional pricing on new models (typically limited-time)
- Priority processing for GPT-5.1 at 2x standard rate

## Additional Resources

- Changelog tabs: Windsurf Next, JetBrains Plugin
- Documentation: docs.windsurf.com
- Social: Twitter/X (@windsurf), Discord community
- Arena Leaderboard available
- Windsurf University program
